name: Modification of ld.so.preload
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Tony Lambert), oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Modification of ld.so.preload
SIGMA Description: Identifies modification of ld.so.preload for shared object injection. This technique is used by attackers to load arbitrary code into processes.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%path%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/ld.so.preload%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Modification of ld.so.preload on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%path%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/ld.so.preload%' AQL filter query
